env_vars.name: TRCR_CASES_ROOT
env_vars.purpose: Root directory for case workspaces served by MCP and deployment containers.

env_vars.name: TRCR_SKILL_ROOT
env_vars.purpose: Override path for the repo-local truecrime-cult-research skill copy.

env_vars.name: TRCR_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Self-hosted model spec in provider:model form.

env_vars.name: TRCR_SEARXNG_URL
env_vars.purpose: Local SearXNG endpoint used for source discovery.

env_vars.name: TRCR_QDRANT_URL
env_vars.purpose: Local Qdrant HTTP endpoint for retrieval indexes.

env_vars.name: TRCR_QDRANT_HOST
env_vars.purpose: Qdrant host used by the local memory provider.

env_vars.name: TRCR_QDRANT_PORT
env_vars.purpose: Qdrant port used by the local memory provider.

env_vars.name: TRCR_EMBED_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Local embedding model for retrieval and memory.

env_vars.name: TRCR_MEM0_LLM_PROVIDER
env_vars.purpose: Self-hosted LLM provider for local Mem0 workflows.

env_vars.name: TRCR_MEM0_LLM_MODEL
env_vars.purpose: Model name for local Mem0 workflows.

env_vars.name: TRCR_EMBEDDER_PROVIDER
env_vars.purpose: Local embedder provider for memory workflows.

env_vars.name: TRCR_HOOK_BRANCH
env_vars.purpose: Branch-gate override used by local hook tests and CI dry runs.

env_vars.name: TRCR_REPO_ROOT
env_vars.purpose: Deployment compose root override for mounted repo paths.

env_vars.name: OLLAMA_HOST
env_vars.purpose: Local Ollama endpoint for deployment smoke checks and containers.

env_vars.name: SEARXNG_BASE_URL
env_vars.purpose: SearXNG service base URL used by the local compose stack.

env_vars.name: HF_HOME
env_vars.purpose: Container cache directory for Hugging Face model artifacts.

env_vars.name: TRANSFORMERS_CACHE
env_vars.purpose: Container cache directory for Transformers artifacts.

env_vars.name: SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH
env_vars.purpose: Pinned build timestamp for reproducible release artifacts.
